Summary: As a host, I want to register an account so that I can manage my properties
As a host, I want to log in so that I can access my dashboard
As a guest, I want to access the portal so that I can get help about my stay
As an admin, I want to manage user roles so that access is controlled
As a host, I want to create a property so that guests can be linked to it
As a host, I want to upload a house manual so that the AI can use it to answer questions
As a host, I want to edit my property details so that information stays accurate
As a host, I want to view all my properties so that I can manage them from one place
As a guest, I want to ask a question about the property so that I get an instant answer
As a guest, I want to receive a property-specific response so that the answer is relevant to my stay
As a host, I want the AI to answer from my manual only so that guests receive accurate information
As a host, I want to view the Q&A log so that I can see what guests are asking
As a guest, I want to report a maintenance issue so that the host is notified
As a host, I want to view open maintenance reports so that I can act on them
As a host, I want to mark an issue as resolved so that the guest knows it is fixed
As a host, I want to see issue history so that I can track past problems
